hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.ts|*.js|*.tsx|*.jsx) pnpm eslint --fix "$f" 2>&1; pnpm prettier --write "$f" 2>&1 ;; esac; exit 0
output=$(pnpm check:fix 2>&1 && pnpm vitest run 2>&1 && cargo check --manifest-path "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/src-tauri/Cargo.toml" 2>&1) || { echo "$output" >&2; exit 2; }
